home.subtitle: The ultimate AI exposing your 16 type relationship drama.
home.description: Not your basic astrology BS. We're breaking down WHY you get so triggered by certain people and keep making the same L choices, all through cognitive functions. Enter only if you're ready to get called out.
home.hint: Pro tip: Answer based on your 'completely free weekend self', not your fake work persona.
home.about_link: Already know your 16 type? Click here
home.translate_desc: What does 'I'm fine' actually mean? We translate the passive-aggressive texts and hidden red flags using AI so you don't get played.
home.target_desc: Answer 20 quick questions about their vibe (how fast they text, etc.) and we'll expose their true colors and toxic traits. No cap.
home.sub_1_desc: See exactly why you two clash. No more excuses, just straight up facts.
home.sub_2_desc: Find out who's your ultimate ride-or-die and who is a walking disaster for you.
home.sub_3_desc: AI scores your fatal flaws and predicts how your relationship will inevitably crash and burn.
